title: NABench: Large-Scale Benchmarks of Nucleotide Foundation Models for Fitness Prediction

data.name: NABench benchmark data
data.reason: Fetch through upstream instructions to avoid large implicit downloads.

original_evaluation: Contiguous cross-validation for extrapolation to unseen mutational regions
Zero-shot, few-shot, transfer, and supervised model settings
core_generalization_finding: Random splits test interpolation, while contiguous splits better probe extrapolation to unseen mutational regions.
spectra_demo_hook: Turn random-versus-contiguous evaluation into a full mutational generalization spectrum.

recommended_novelty_axes.name: mutational_distance
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: Hamming, edit, or mutational-set distance from training variants

recommended_novelty_axes.name: positional_distance
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: distance between mutated positions along the reference sequence

recommended_novelty_axes.name: assay_family_distance
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: shared assay, family, organism, or molecule-type metadata

recommended_novelty_axes.name: fitness_extremeness
recommended_novelty_axes.property_graph: distance from training support in measured fitness values
